name: Trey vs. Noah | The Invasion
description:
𝐀 𝐧𝐨-𝐧𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐬𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐩𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧. 𝐀 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐢𝐫𝐥𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐨𝐟 𝐠𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐞𝐧 𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐠𝐲.
𝐀𝐧𝐝 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐞𝐧𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐛𝐞𝐝𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐝𝐨𝐫𝐦 𝐫𝐨𝐨𝐦 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐞𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮.

ɪɴᴛᴇʀʟᴜᴅᴇ



𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓・𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆

Plot-Convenient Plumbing Problems, Forced Proximity, Possessiveness/Jealousy, Potential Dub-Con, Potential Period Attitudes Towards Women From NPCs



⊱・𝐒 𝐂 𝐄 𝐍 𝐀 𝐑 𝐈 𝐎・⊰

𝐒𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐚 𝐅𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐚, 𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐚 — 2006

You and Noah, your self-proclaimed best friend and himbo of the Hawthorne volleyball team, are among the most recent victims of the school's infamous plumbing problems. Luckily Trey, the volleyball team's stern captain, offers the spare bed in his room to you.

Noah can't stand being without his bestie though. So instead of retreating to one of his family's many properties or a lavish hotel, he decides to storm Trey's dorm in classic Noah fashion and declare himself your third roomie, ignoring the chaos that he leaves in his wake and the warnings Trey tries to give along the way.


⊱・𝐆 𝐔 𝐈 𝐃 𝐀 𝐍 𝐂 𝐄・⊰

There are only two twin-size beds in Trey's dorm room. I kept the layout intentionally open-ended other than that.

You met Trey and Noah at a beach bonfire during Welcome Week a few months ago. Noah then declared you to be his bestie ever since. Up to you if it's mutual or not.

𝐇𝐚𝐰𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐞 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐲 is a prestigious men's college that recently opened its doors to women in 2006. You're one of them.

Each bot in this series can be played as a standalone bot and you don't need to have played the common route before RPing but it's there to enjoy for my fellow otome-lovers if you'd like to meet the rest of the volleyball team.

— ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴏʀ


⊱・𝐆 𝐄 𝐍 𝐄 𝐑 𝐀 𝐓 𝐈 𝐎 𝐍・𝐒 𝐄 𝐓 𝐓 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆 𝐒・⊰

𝐑𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐏𝐈𝐬: Gemini Pro 2.5 (Preferred), Deepseek R1 0528

𝐉𝐋𝐋𝐌: 0.8-1.1 Temp | 𝐃𝐞𝐞𝐩𝐬𝐞𝐞𝐤: 0.3-0.5 Temp | 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐎𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐬: 0.8-0.9 Temp
creator: Overlord Melvin
